chunks.title: The People's Rebellion and Moses' Intercession
chunks.reason: Describes the congregation's grumbling, the spies' reaction, and the initial divine appearance.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Judgment and Moses' Plea
chunks.reason: Contains the direct exchange between Yahweh and Moses regarding the fate of the people.

chunks.title: The Decree of Forty Years
chunks.reason: A formal declaration by Yahweh detailing the specific punishment for the generation.

chunks.title: Fate of the Spies
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the spies' deaths and the survival of Joshua and Caleb.

chunks.title: The Hasty Ascent to the Hill Country
chunks.reason: Describes the people's attempt to enter the land after the decree and their subsequent defeat.
